posts.name: GoodMoat
posts.tagline: AI Stock valuation & data platform for every stock
posts.description: Most valuation tools are black boxes. GoodMoat shows its work: every number traces back to the original SEC filing, with its source and refresh time. It values any stock with a full DCF, a Reverse DCF (what growth is priced in?), and three cross-checked fair-value models. X-Ray, our AI deep-dive, turns 40+ financials into a plain-English read on whether a business has a real moat or just hype. AI-powered, but every output is checked against the source filing — no hallucinated numbers.

posts.name: CloudXena Google Drive Duplicate Cleaner
posts.tagline: Find and Remove Duplicate Files from Google Drive
posts.description: CloudXena Google Drive Duplicate Cleaner is an efficient tool designed to identify & remove duplicate files from Google Drive with accuracy. It helps users free up valuable storage space, improve file organization, and reduce clutter in their cloud accounts. The software scans documents, images, videos, and other file types to detect duplicates and allows users to review results before deletion. Its user-friendly interface makes Google Drive management simple for both individuals & businesses.
